product.name: Frame style
product.description: Describes the design or type of frame for artwork, such as modern or rustic

product.name: Color
product.description: Defines the primary color or pattern, such as blue or striped

product.name: Power source
product.description: Specifies the power source a product uses to operate, such as solar or batteries

product.name: Connectivity technology
product.description: Defines the method of data transfer in a product, e.g. Bluetooth, USB

product.name: Connection type
product.description: Specifies the type of connection used by electronics, such as wired or Bluetooth

product.name: Recommended age group
product.description: Identifies the suitable age range for a product, typically toys and games; e.g. babies, teens

product.name: Toy/Game material
product.description: Identifies the main material used in a toy or game, such as plastic or wood

product.name: Device interface
product.description: Specifies the method of connection between electronic devices, e.g. HDMI, USB

product.name: Item condition
product.description: Indicates the quality of an item, typically vehicles or vehicle parts; e.g. certified pre-owned, refurbished

product.name: Manufacturer type
product.description: Specifies the source of vehicle parts or accessories, such as genuine or third-party

product.name: Fabric
product.description: Identifies the type of fabric used in a product, for example, cotton or denim

product.name: Vehicle seating features
product.description: Describes the special features of vehicle seats, such as heated or reclining

product.name: Mount/Stand features
product.description: Details the specific characteristics of a product's mount or stand, like adjustable angle or foldable

product.name: Memory technology
product.description: Specifies the type of memory used in electronic devices, such as DDR or SDRAM

product.name: Cosmetic condition
product.description: Defines the wear and condition of electronics, e.g. new, opened-never used

product.name: Operating system
product.description: Defines the system software a device uses, such as iOS or ChromeOS

product.name: Processor family
product.description: Identifies the series or brand of the electronic device's CPU, e.g. Intel Core i7

product.name: Computer form
product.description: Defines the physical design or layout of a computer, such as all-in-one or notebook

product.name: Cooling technology
product.description: Specifies the method used to cool electronics, such as air or heat sink

product.name: Graphics card type
product.description: Specifies the type of graphics card in a computer, e.g. professional, dedicated

product.name: Memory form factor
product.description: Specifies the physical layout of memory modules, such as DIMM or micro-DIMM

product.name: Storage types supported
product.description: Defines compatible storage systems for electronics, e.g. Hard disk drive (HDD)

product.name: Computer specialized features
product.description: Highlights specific computer features, like liquid cooling system or RGB lighting

product.name: Target gender
product.description: Identifies the intended gender for a product, such as female, male or unisex

product.name: Vehicle type
product.description: Classifies the type of vehicle, for example, SUV or sailboat

product.name: Motorcycle glove purpose
product.description: Identifies the intended use of motorcycle gloves, such as off-road or touring

product.name: Handwear material
product.description: Describes the type of material used in gloves or mittens, such as faux fur or wool

product.name: Protective gear features
product.description: Identifies the unique characteristics of protective gear, such as shockproof or anti-fog

product.name: Accessory size
product.description: Defines the size of an accessory product, such as one size or compact

product.name: Search product boosts
product.description: List of search queries for which a product gets higher rank in search results

product.name: Related products
product.description: List of related products

product.name: Related products settings
product.description: Determines how related products are displayed along with algorithmic product recommendations

product.name: Complementary products
product.description: List of complementary products

product.name: Activity
product.description: Specifies the sport or activity the product is designed for, such as tennis or pilates

product.name: Sleeve length type
product.description: Specifies the style of sleeves on clothing items, such as short or sleeveless

product.name: Age group
product.description: Defines the target age range for a product, such as adults or kids

product.name: Size
product.description: Used to specify the size of a product, such as 0-3 months or Extra large (XL)

product.name: Clothing features
product.description: Describes unique properties of apparel, such as water resistant or wrinkle resistant

product.name: Cover material
product.description: Identifies the type of fabric or material used in the product's cover, such as silk or cotton

product.name: Fit type
product.description: Describes the fit type for vehicle parts and accessories, like custom or universal

product.name: Item material
product.description: Specifies the primary substance of an item, typically for vehicle parts and accessories; e.g. copper, fiberglass

product.name: Display technology
product.description: Defines the type of screen technology used in a product, e.g. LED, e-ink

product.name: Display resolution
product.description: Defines resolution of a digital display, e.g. 1280 x 1024, full HD

product.name: Native aspect ratio
product.description: Specifies the original aspect ratio of a display, typically for projectors; e.g. 16:8

product.name: Monitor shape
product.description: Specifies the contour of a monitor's screen, such as flat or curved
